bone.$description: Bone — Page canvas, card surfaces, image gutters — warm off-white that reads as heavy cream paper or raw plaster, not digital gray

ink.$description: Ink — Dark supporting neutral for text, icons, and strong contrast. Do not promote it to the primary CTA color

paper-white.$description: Paper White — Reverse text on dark announcement bar, reverse logo overlays on photography

space-mono.$description: Sole typeface for nav, links, body, labels, and logo lockup. Monospace at weight 400 — the only font — creates a technical, editorial voice; the rigid monospaced rhythm signals fashion-zine rather than commerce.

bone-canvas.$description: Surface level 1: Full-page base — everything sits on this warm off-white

ink-band.$description: Surface level 2: Announcement bar and any reverse-mode surfaces
